arts.ttl: ‘Absolute top’ - Kovac hails Barca’s attack ahead of Dortmund tie
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund boss Niko Kovac has been looking ahead to Wednesday’s Champions League tie with Barcelona and knows his team are in for a tough night. “I’m happy to see Hansi.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Gittens eyes BVB exit as Man Utd, Liverpool circle
arts.sum: Manchester United and Liverpool appear set to battle for the signature of Dortmund's Jamie Gittens. Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.

arts.ttl: Chelsea, Arsenal receive Jamie Gittens boost as winger 'outlines transfer stance' ahead of summer window
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea reportedly receive a boost to their hopes of signing Borussia Dortmund star Jamie Gittens in the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Barcelona plan to reopen talks with leading transfer target this summer
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Barcelona intend to kick back into gear negotiations with a long-time transfer target this coming summer. That’s according to Diario Sport, who point towards…

arts.ttl: CSD chief says Olmo is still playing for Barca due to a Tebas ‘mistake’
arts.sum: Uribes says La Liga president Javier Tebas is wrong to call for the two players to effectively be banned from playing for Barcelona and says the CSD’s decision is correct. José Manuel Rodríguez Uribes, the president of the CSD, has given a new interview where he’s shared his thoughts on the registration saga surrounding Barcelona stars Dani Olmo and Pau Victor.

arts.ttl: Barcelona go all the way/Real Madrid knocked out: Supercomputer predicts Champions League outcome
arts.sum: A supercomputer has this week predicted the outcome for this season’s Champions League. And it spells altogether good news for Hansi Flick’s Barcelona. As per Marca, citing statistical specialists Opta:…

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund announce major injury blow ahead of Barcelona clash
arts.sum: Bundesliga giants Borussia Dortmund have on Monday announced nothing short of a hammer blow on the personnel front. This comes amid confirmation that key defender Nico Schlotterbeck has been ruled out…
